# Total: 10

2. What is the runtime of a given film?
3. Which actors are linked to a specific film via their roles?
4. How many years has a person lived based on their birth and death year?
5. What is the original title of a given film?
6. Which genres are associated with a specific film?
7. Are there any adult films in the dataset?
8. What is the primary name of a given person?
9. In which year was a specific film released?
10. Which persons have acted or directed in films?
